scope_notes: Kernel only: gated family, FFI, layers (fast-math, operation tables, parallel loops) excluded per SCOPE-1.
No worked examples included yet — round-4 says examples count toward the pack; estimate +2-4k tokens for a canonical example set.
Diagnostics vocabulary and edit-list schema not yet drafted — no-shadow-spec rule says they count; estimate +1-2k.
finding: Projected full teaching pack ~7-9k tokens, comfortably inside even the strictest debated budget (10k). The D2 spec-compactness constraint appears satisfiable with margin; the binding constraint will be layer/periphery growth, policed by the spec-delta gate.
caveats: v0 is a draft, not ratified; adversarial critique pending.
Rule individuation not yet owner-defined; 59 is the naive count.
Tokenizers: tiktoken cl100k/o200k; no Anthropic tokenizer run yet.

notes: v0.1 addresses all 13 blocking and all major critique findings (or records explicit DEFERRED deltas); adds closed grammar, prelude, operation table, worked example, capability/gate/ledger stubs.
Rule count grew from 57 unique to ~75 (recount pending owner rule-individuation procedure).

Spec roughly doubled (3.2k -> 6.3k tokens) and still fits the projected pack budget: spec 6.3k + examples included + diagnostics schemas deferred (~1-2k) => ~8k total, inside the 10k strictest anchor.
